summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Astra Capital website with 4 business areas. Tested preloader animation, slider functionality, navigation, theme colors, responsiveness and interactive elements.

ui_bugs.issue: Slide-to-button mapping incorrect - first 'Bereich erkunden' button points to vending.html instead of development.html

passed_tests: Preloader TOR animation works perfectly with 4 phases
Hero slider between 4 business areas functional
Area indicators on right side clickable and responsive
Theme toggle works (dark/light mode with wave animation)
Coming soon links prevent navigation correctly
Development page navigation (Home, About, Services, Works, Team, Contact) works
Back to top button appears on scroll and works
Contact form fields fillable and submits with alert
Ecom page displays correct GREEN color theme
Consulting page displays correct GOLD color theme
Vending page displays correct PURPLE color theme
Footer links between all business areas work
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix the main page hero slider button mapping - the first slide (Development) button should link to pages/development.html instead of pages/vending.html. The slide order and button order appear to be misaligned.
success_percentage: frontend: 95% (1 mapping issue out of 18+ features tested)
